title: Introduction to Git Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git version control concepts.

questions.question: What is the primary role of Git?
options: To collect and analyze data from the database server and queries
To track changes to your code over time and coordinate work among multiple developers on a single project

questions.question: Which of these is a key metric to monitor for Git performance?
Regarding Git collaboration, which approach is more common in modern application development?
A situation where two or more transactions are waiting for each other to release a lock, resulting in a hang, is called a _______.
